description: Create a content slide with a two-column layout on the US-China AI race, using a horizontal bar chart for cumulative AI investment by geography on the left and a stacked vertical bar chart comparing automatable vs augmentable working hours for the US and China on the right.

header.headline: The US and China command over 80% of global AI investment, positioning themselves as the dominant competitors in the intensifying AI “arms” race

left.title: The US and China account for over 80% of global AI investment... Cumulative private investment in AI by geographic area (2013-2024), USD billions

right.title: ...as they race to automate or augment 33%-44% of annual working hours. Average annual working hours per worker by geographic area
